steps: Upon reaching at least 85% confluency, harvest neural progenitor cells as described in protocol below. Neural progenitor expansion protocol
Add equal volumes of NIM and 2x neural freezing medium to the NPC cell suspension for a final 1 x 10 6 cells/mL.
Gently mix solution and distribute 1 mL into sterile cryovials. Store cryovials in Styrofoam containers at -80 °C for 48:00:00 and then transfer to liquid nitrogen for long-term storage.
Perform a cell count in 3 mL of NIM using a hemacytometer.
creator: Celeste M M. Karch
